subcodes.first_line: O Gabriel, the trusted and beloved! Where are thy glad-tidings, and where thy tokens? Where is the quenching of the fires of the Friend of God, and where [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا جبریل الامین الحبیب این بشارتک و این اشارتک این اطفاء نیران الخلیل و این
subcodes.subjects: @the concourse on high, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
